support_page.title: Support my work!
support_page.subtitle: If you appreciate what I do and want to help me continue, here's how you can do it. Any help is truly appreciated 💖

direct.title: ☕ Offer me a coffee
direct.subtitle: Direct support for my independent game development

kofi.desc: Make a one-time donation or become a member to support my projects. It's commission-free and completely flexible.

paypal.desc: Donate directly through PayPal. You can use credit or debit cards or your PayPal account.

github.desc: Sponsor me on GitHub. It's a great way to show your appreciation and support my work.

mutual.title: 🤝 Mutual Support
mutual.subtitle: You help me, I help you: win-win!

gitkraken.desc: GitKraken is a powerful Git client. Click below to get 50% off Pro, and help me with a commission.

ms_rewards.desc: Earn rewards points by searching with Bing. Click my referral link, sign up, and earn bonus points together.

revolut.desc: Join me and over 75 million other users who love Revolut.

thanks.title:
Thank you so much for your support!
💖
thanks.subtitle: Every contribution helps me dedicate more time to game development and tools.
